busnesco-bi.title: BUSNESCO BI: Business Intelligence Platform
busnesco-bi.subtitle: Transforming raw data into actionable insights through clear, dynamic, and real-time dashboards.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: BUSNESCO BI is an intuitive Business Intelligence platform designed to help companies manage their performance through centralized and visual tracking of Key Performance Indicators (KPIs). It aims to democratize BI for SMEs without requiring advanced data science skills.

features.title: Core Features & Capabilities
list: Customizable Dashboards: Tailored views for Sales, Finance, Marketing, HR, and Operations.
Real-time KPI Tracking: Live updates with integrated alerts and notifications.
Advanced Visualizations: Interactive charts, gauges, heatmaps, and trend curves.
Multi-source Connectivity: Seamless integration with ERPs, CRMs, Google Sheets, and APIs.
Automated Reporting: Schedule and export professional reports effortlessly.
Responsive Interface: Mobile-first design for access on any device.

tech.title: Strategic Positioning
tech.description: The platform focuses on daily operational management rather than hyper-complex analysis, offering simplicity and power to replace static Excel reports with collaborative intelligence.

glpi-deployment.title: GLPI Deployment: IT Service Management (ITSM)
glpi-deployment.subtitle: Centralizing and optimizing IT service management through a robust open-source solution aligned with ITIL standards.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: Within a private company infrastructure, GLPI was deployed to modernize the information system. The project aimed to centralize IT assets, structure user requests, and improve the overall quality of IT support by aligning processes with ITIL best practices.

features.title: Key Features & Implementation
list: Asset Management (CMDB): Complete inventory of hardware (computers, servers) and software lifecycle tracking.
Service Desk & Helpdesk: Advanced ticketing system with automatic assignment rules, SLAs, and escalation paths.
Self-Service Portal: Dedicated user portal for ticket creation and real-time tracking.
Knowledge Base: Centralized repository of solutions to capitalize on recurring issues.
Reporting & KPIs: Custom dashboards providing support performance metrics to IT management.

tech.title: Technical Execution
tech.description: The deployment included on-premise server setup, secure access configuration, and integration with Active Directory/LDAP. Specialized plugins like GLPI Inventory were configured for automated asset tracking.

matrix-connect.title: MatrixConnect: Telecom Infrastructure & AI Assistant
matrix-connect.subtitle: A strategic partner for digital transformation, providing high-end connectivity and security solutions with an integrated AI chatbot.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: MatrixConnect is a telecommunications infrastructure operator specializing in high-end, secure connectivity solutions for businesses. The project focuses on positioning the company as a strategic partner in digital transformation by offering a robust network foundation enhanced by modern interactive tools.

features.title: Core Solutions & Innovation
list: High-Speed Connectivity: Ultra-fast and stable internet access based on a state-of-the-art fiber optic network.
Global Interconnection (MPLS): Secure private network connecting all sites and collaborators with high QoS and data confidentiality.
SD-WAN: Intelligent solution that optimizes application performance (Cloud, SaaS, Video) while simplifying management and reducing costs.
Managed Security (MSSP): 24/7 proactive cybersecurity monitoring via a Security Operations Center (SOC).
AI Chatbot Integration: An intelligent virtual assistant that provides precise information on services and guides users in natural language.

tech.title: Value Added
tech.description: MatrixConnect distinguishes itself through its latest generation telecom infrastructure and its commitment to innovation, notably through the integration of AI to simplify access to complex information and improve user experience.

trust-ai.title: TrustAI Shield: AI Fraud & Deepfake Detection
trust-ai.subtitle: TrustAI Shield is an intelligent digital guardian designed to help users browse the web with confidence by detecting online scams, fake profiles, and deepfakes.

about.title: About the Project: Purpose
about.description: The project aims to build an intelligent digital guardian that helps users browse the Web with confidence. Its objectives include: detecting and protecting against online scams, fake profiles and deepfakes, providing a browser-based extension for real-time analysis, giving each analysed item a Trust Score, ensuring users data privacy, enabling users to report suspicious content, and educating users about digital hygiene.

features.title: Key Features
list: Real-Time Browser Analysis: An extension integrates directly into the browser to provide immediate evaluations of suspicious pages or profiles.
Trust Score Calculation: Assigns a simple risk/reliability score to any analyzed web page, profile, or media, simplifying the user's decision-making process.
Advanced Detection: Core algorithms identify fake social profiles, fraudulent schemes, and manipulated media like deepfakes by analyzing content, metadata, and behavioral signals.
Secure Content Analysis: Users can safely upload URLs, images, and videos for assessment, with a strong focus on data privacy and protection.
Community Reporting Mechanism: Allows users to report suspicious content, contributing to a shared threat intelligence database that improves future detection for everyone.
Educational Resources: Provides downloadable guides, blog articles, and information about online safety to proactively educate users.
Enhanced User Experience: Features a multilingual interface and a theme toggle (light/dark mode) for broad accessibility and user comfort.

tech.title: Technical Approach
tech.description: TrustAI Shield combines a user-friendly interface with a powerful back-end analysis engine. It is built to be intuitive, requiring no technical training, and delivers results in under 10 seconds with 98% accuracy validated on over 10,000 real cases.

traffic-analysis.title: AI-Powered Road Traffic Analysis System
traffic-analysis.subtitle: An intelligent solution to transform traffic scenes into actionable dashboards, aiming to reduce accidents and corruption.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: Facing the alarming increase in road accidents in Cameroon, this project uses AI to provide precise data to authorities. The goal is to move from 'gut-feeling' management to informed decision-making backed by precise measurement instruments at intersections and critical road sections.

features.title: Features & Impact
list: Real-time detection and classification (cars, motorcycles, buses, trucks) via YOLO.
Multi-object tracking to reconstruct trajectories and uniquely identify each vehicle.
Precise speed measurement (km/h) through scene calibration and NumPy calculations.
Automatic violation detection (speeding beyond 60 km/h).
Structured report generation (CSV) to assist municipal or governmental decision-making.
Potential for digital fine payment to eradicate road-side corruption.

tech.title: Technical Architecture
tech.description: Designed to run on standard hardware (Core i5), the system combines YOLO for fast detection, OpenCV for video stream processing, and NumPy for physical calculations. This approach demonstrates that local technological sovereignty is possible using open tools to address national road safety challenges.

network-chatbot.title: Enhancing User Experience in Network Monitoring through AI
network-chatbot.subtitle: An AIOps approach transforming complex Zabbix interactions into a simple and intuitive dialogue via WhatsApp.

about.title: About the Project: Simplifying Network Operations
about.description: The proposed solution aims to significantly improve the network monitoring administrator experience through Artificial Intelligence (AI). It represents an AIOps (AI for IT Operations) approach, transforming the complex interaction with the existing supervision system (Zabbix) into a simple, intuitive, and effective dialogue via WhatsApp.

features.title: AI and Automation Features
list: Conversational WhatsApp Interface: Allows administrators to access monitoring information through an intuitive WhatsApp interface, providing real-time mobile access to network metrics.
Secure Authentication: Access to secure Zabbix commands is protected by chatbot authentication. The system temporarily blocks access after 3 incorrect password attempts.

Natural Language Analysis (`!zabbix analyze`): Provides a natural language summary of system performance, identifies priority issues, and offers recommendations using the Gemini API to interpret raw JSON data from Zabbix.
Failure Prevention (`!zabbix predict`): Estimates the risk of an incident for a host based on its metrics (RAM, CPU, ROM) using the Random Forest machine learning algorithm.
Automated Ticket Generation: The workflow automates the creation of support tickets via the GLPI API as soon as a technical incident is detected by Zabbix.

Enriched Notifications: Alerts received via WhatsApp are detailed and structured, including the GLPI ticket ID, a direct link, the host name, problem description, severity level, and a non-technical analysis with solution recommendations provided by the AI.

tech.title: Technical Implementation
tech.description: The solution is built on a multi-layered technology stack: Zabbix for technical monitoring, WhatsApp as the conversational entry point, n8n as the collection and automation engine, the Gemini language model for natural language interpretation, and GLPI for automated incident management. This transforms reactive monitoring into a proactive, intelligent supervision system, drastically reducing incident resolution times (MTTR).

secure-access-control.title: Robust Network Access Control System
secure-access-control.subtitle: A comprehensive security solution designed to protect corporate networks by implementing granular access control based on user identity and roles.

about.title: About the Project: Fortifying the First Line of Defense
about.description: In any corporate environment, controlling who can access the network is the first and most critical line of defense. This project involved engineering a robust and scalable access control system from the ground up, moving beyond simple password protection to a sophisticated, identity-based security model.

features.title: Key Features
list: AAA Framework: Utilizes the full Authentication, Authorization, and Accounting (AAA) framework with Freeradius on a Linux server to manage network access.
802.1X Port-Based Authentication: Implements the IEEE 802.1X standard to ensure that only authenticated and authorized devices can connect to network ports (both wired and wireless).
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): Assigns specific access rules and network segments (VLANs) to users based on their role within the organization, ensuring the principle of least privilege.
Comprehensive Access Logging: All access attempts—successful or failed—are logged, providing a clear and auditable trail for security analysis and compliance.

tech.title: Technical Implementation
tech.description: The system is centered around a Freeradius server running on a hardened Linux distribution. It integrates with existing network infrastructure, including Cisco switches and routers, to enforce access policies. The configuration allows for high scalability and can be adapted to support various authentication methods and directory services like LDAP or Active Directory.

exchange-deployment.title: Exchange Server SE Deployment
exchange-deployment.subtitle: Deployment of an Exchange Server Subscription Edition mail server within a corporate infrastructure.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: This project involved the deployment and configuration of an Exchange Server Subscription Edition (SE) to provide secure and reliable email services for the organization. It required careful planning, infrastructure preparation, and seamless migration from legacy systems.

features.title: Key Features
list: Exchange Server SE installation and configuration
Provision of N1/N2 technical support to on-site and remote employees
Management and prioritisation of incidents via Odoo ticketing tool
Administration of user accounts: creation, modification, reset of access
Installation and configuration of workstations

tech.title: Technical Implementation
tech.description: The deployment used Windows Server as the base OS, with Exchange Server SE for mail services. Integration with Microsoft 365 and Teams was implemented to enhance collaboration. The project also involved setting up hardware and software monitoring to ensure 24/7 service availability.
